'; panel.querySelector('#tebiki-close').onclick = function() { bg.remove(); }; var prevBtn = panel.querySelector('#tebiki-prev'); if (prevBtn) prevBtn.onclick = function() { currentStep--; render(); panel.querySelector('[style*="overflow-y"]').scrollTop=0; }; var nextBtn = panel.querySelector('#tebiki-next'); if (nextBtn) nextBtn.onclick = function() { currentStep++; render(); panel.querySelector('[style*="overflow-y"]').scrollTop=0; }; var doneBtn = panel.querySelector('#tebiki-done'); if (doneBtn) doneBtn.onclick = function() { bg.remove(); showToast('手引之書を読み終えました'); }; var cb = panel.querySelector('#step-check-box'); if (cb) { var checked=false; cb.onclick = function() { checked=!checked; cb.style.background=checked?'var(--green)':'var(--bg)'; cb.style.borderColor=checked?'var(--green)':'var(--border)'; cb.innerHTML=checked?'':''; }; } } bg.appendChild(panel); bg.onclick = function(e) { if(e.target===bg) bg.remove(); }; document.getElementById('app').appendChild(bg); render(); } // ── 解決手引ボタンを描画 ── function renderHelpBtn(guideKey, label) { label = label || '解決手引'; var btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.textContent = label; btn.style.cssText = 'display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:5px 12px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:99px;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap'; btn.onclick = function() { showHelpGuide(guideKey); }; return btn; } // ── 解決手引インデックス（一覧表示） ── function showHelpIndex() { var bg = document.createElement('div'); bg.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:1000;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center'; var panel = document.createElement('div'); panel.style.cssText = 'background:var(--bg);width:100%;max-width:540px;border-radius:20px 20px 0 0;padding:24px 20px 32px;box-shadow:0 -8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'; var guides = [ { key:'kakutei', label:'確定申告書の転記手順', desc:'国税庁サイトへの転記を5つの手引で解説', steps:5 }, { key:'csv_import', label:'銀行CSVの取込手順', desc:'銀行明細を自動仕訳に変換する5つの手引', steps:5 }, { key:'norikae', label:'他社ソフトからの乗り換え', desc:'月額費用を節約して移行する5つの手引', steps:5 }, ]; panel.innerHTML = '
' + '
手引之書
' + '
解決手引
' + '' + '
' + '
困ったときはこちらをご覧ください

' + '

' + '
' + g.desc + '
' + '

→

'; }).join(''); bg.appendChild(panel); bg.onclick = function(e) { if(e.target===bg) bg.remove(); }; document.getElementById('app').appendChild(bg); panel.querySelector('#help-idx-close').onclick = function() { bg.remove(); }; panel.querySelectorAll('.help-idx-item').forEach(function(item) { item.onclick = function() { bg.remove(); showHelpGuide(item.dataset.key); }; }); } // ── 同一レシート判定 ── function isSameReceipt(r1, r2) { if (!r1 || !r2) return false; var t1 = new Date(r1.captured_at || r1.saved_at || 0).getTime(); var t2 = new Date(r2.captured_at || r2.saved_at || 0).getTime(); var timeDiff = Math.abs(t1 - t2); var sameTime = timeDiff < 5 * 60 * 1000; var sameVendor = r1.vendor && r2.vendor && r1.vendor === r2.vendor; var sameAmount = r1.amount && r2.amount && r1.amount === r2.amount; return sameTime && (sameVendor || sameAmount); } // 誤結合確認ダイアログ function showSeparateReceiptConfirm(onSeparate, onKeep) { var bg = document.createElement('div'); bg.className = 'modal-bg'; var modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.className = 'modal'; modal.style.maxWidth = '320px'; modal.innerHTML = '
' + '
別のレシートですか？
' + '
前の撮影と同じレシートとして結合されています。別のレシートの場合は分けて保存します。
' + '
' + '' + '' + '
'; bg.appendChild(modal); document.getElementById('app').appendChild(bg); document.getElementById('sep-yes').onclick = function() { bg.remove(); if(onSeparate) onSeparate(); }; document.getElementById('sep-no').onclick = function() { bg.remove(); if(onKeep) onKeep(); }; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // 他社ソフトからのデータ移行ツール // freee / 弥生 / マネーフォワード CSV → 忍者帳場 // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // 各社CSVの列定義 // 科目名マッピング（他社→忍者帳場） // CSVパース（Shift-JIS対応） // 列を自動マッピング // CSVを仕訳に変換 // 移行ツールのメイン画面 // 移行プレビュー // 移行実行 // ── 確定申告プレビュー ── function renderKakuteiPreview() { var el = document.getElementById('main-content'); if (!el) return; if (!currentAcct || !accounts[currentAcct]) { el.innerHTML='
事業者を選択してください
'; return; } var kd = typeof getKakuteiData==='function' ? getKakuteiData() : null; var d = typeof getKakuteiDeductions==='function' ? getKakuteiDeductions() : {}; var KISO_KOJO=480000,FUKKO_RATE=0.021,BLUE_65=650000,BLUE_10=100000; var income=kd?(kd.income||0):0,expense=kd?(kd.expense||0):0; var jigyoShotoku=Math.max(0,income-expense); var blueKojo=d.aoiro==='65'?BLUE_65:(d.aoiro==='10'?BLUE_10:0); var afterBlue=Math.max(0,jigyoShotoku-blueKojo); var shakai=(d.shakaihoken_list||[]).reduce(function(s,x){return s+(x.amount||0);},0); var ideco=(d.ideco_list||[]).reduce(function(s,x){return s+(x.amount||0);},0); var iryo=Math.max(0,(d.iryo_list||[]).reduce(function(s,x){return s+(x.amount||0);},0)-100000); var haigusha=d.haigusha||0,fuyou=(d.fuyou_count||0)*380000,genzensen=d.genzensen||0; var totalDed=shakai+ideco+iryo+haigusha+fuyou+KISO_KOJO; var kazei=Math.max(0,afterBlue-totalDed); function calcTax(k){var br=[[1950000,0.05,0],[3300000,0.1,97500],[6950000,0.2,427500],[9000000,0.23,636000],[18000000,0.33,1536000],[40000000,0.4,2796000],[Infinity,0.45,4796000]];for(var i=0;i=0?'納める税金':'還付金'),Math.abs(nozei)]]; el.innerHTML='
本プレビューは参考値です。正式な申告には国税庁「確定申告書等作成コーナー」をご利用ください。
' +'
確定申告書 第一表
' +rows.map(function(r,i){return'
'+r[0]+''+r[1].toLocaleString()+'円
';}).join('') +'
' +'
控除情報の入力
' +'
' +'
' +'
' +'
' +'
' +'
'; document.getElementById('kk-save').onclick=function(){ var nd={aoiro:document.getElementById('kk-aoiro').value,shakaihoken_list:[{amount:parseInt(document.getElementById('kk-shakai').value)||0}],ideco_list:[{amount:parseInt(document.getElementById('kk-ideco').value)||0}],iryo_list:[{amount:parseInt(document.getElementById('kk-iryo').value)||0}],genzensen:parseInt(document.getElementById('kk-gen').value)||0,haigusha:d.haigusha||0,fuyou_count:d.fuyou_count||0}; if(typeof saveKakuteiDeductions==='function')saveKakuteiDeductions(nd); renderKakuteiPreview();showToast('保存しました'); }; } // ── データ移行ツール ── function renderMigration() { var el=document.getElementById('main-content'); if(!el||!currentAcct||!accounts[currentAcct]){if(el)el.innerHTML='
事業者を選択してください
';return;} var fmts={freee:'freee会計',yayoi:'弥生会計',mf:'マネーフォワード',generic:'その他（汎用CSV）'}; var notes={freee:'freeeの「仕訳帳」→「エクスポート」→「CSV」からダウンロードできます。',yayoi:'弥生の「ファイル」→「エクスポート」→「仕訳日記帳」からダウンロードできます。',mf:'マネーフォワードの「会計帳簿」→「仕訳帳」→「エクスポート」からダウンロードできます。',generic:'日付・摘要・金額・科目の列を手動でマッピングします。'}; el.innerHTML='
他社ソフトからのデータ移行
' +'
現在お使いの会計ソフトのCSVを取り込んで、忍者帳場に仕訳を移行します。
' +'
' +'
'+notes.freee+'
' +'
' +'' +'
'; document.getElementById('mig-fmt').onchange=function(){document.getElementById('mig-note').textContent=notes[this.value]||'';}; document.getElementById('mig-btn').onclick=function(){ var file=document.getElementById('mig-file').files[0]; if(!file){showToast('CSVファイルを選択してください');return;} var reader=new FileReader(); reader.onload=function(e){ var lines=e.target.result.split(/[\r\n]+/).filter(function(l){return l.trim();}); if(!lines.length){showToast('データが見つかりませんでした');return;} var headers=lines[0].split(',').map(function(h){return h.replace(/^"|"$/g,'').trim();}); var rows=lines.slice(1).map(function(l){var cols=l.split(',');var row={};cols.forEach(function(c,i){if(i=0||h.indexOf('date')>=0;})||headers[0]; var descKey=headers.find(function(h){return h.indexOf('摘要')>=0||h.indexOf('内容')>=0;})||headers[1]||''; var amtKey=headers.find(function(h){return h.indexOf('金額')>=0;})||''; var catKey=headers.find(function(h){return h.indexOf('科目')>=0;})||''; var journals=rows.filter(function(r){return r[dateKey];}).map(function(r,i){ var amt=parseInt((r[amtKey]||'0').replace(/[^0-9-]/g,''))||0; return{id:Date.now()+i,date:(r[dateKey]||'').replace(/\//g,'-'),type:amt>=0?'income':'expense',amount:Math.abs(amt),category:r[catKey]||'未分類',description:r[descKey]||'取込データ',status:'unconfirmed',source:'migration'}; }).filter(function(j){return j.amount>0;}); var el2=document.getElementById('mig-result'); el2.innerHTML='
'+journals.length+'件が見つかりました
' +journals.slice(0,5).map(function(j){return'
'+j.date+''+j.description+''+j.amount.toLocaleString()+'円
';}).join('') +(journals.length>5?'
他 '+(journals.length-5)+' 件...
':'') +'' +'
'; document.getElementById('mig-import').onclick=function(){ var a=accounts[currentAcct];if(!a.journals)a.journals=[]; journals.forEach(function(j){a.journals.push(j);}); save(currentAcct);showToast(journals.length+'件を取り込みました'); el2.innerHTML='';setTimeout(function(){switchTab('review');},500); }; }; reader.readAsText(file,'UTF-8'); }; } // ── EY監査法人 会計基準参照 ── const EY_BASE_URL = 'https://www.ey.com/ja_jp/assurance/accounting-standards'; // 会計基準の参考情報（EYガイドラインベース） const ACCOUNTING_STANDARDS = { '売上高': { category: '売上', type: '収益', standard: 'IFRS15/ASC606 売上認識基準' }, '外注費': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '独立企業間取引基準' }, '地代家賃': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: 'IAS17/IFRS16 リース基準' }, '減価償却費': { category: '費用', type: '不課税', standard: 'IAS16 有形固定資産基準' }, '交際費': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '法人税法第37条' }, '旅費交通費': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '実費精算原則' }, '通信費': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '発生主義会計原則' }, '消耗品費': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '重要性の原則（5万円基準）' }, '広告宣伝費': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '費用収益対応原則' }, '水道光熱費': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '発生主義会計原則' }, '損害保険料': { category: '費用', type: '非課税', standard: '保険料・共済掛金処理基準' }, '支払報酬料': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '報酬・給与区分基準' }, '支払利息': { category: '費用', type: '非課税', standard: 'IAS23 借入コスト基準' }, '雑費': { category: '費用', type: '課税仕入', standard: '重要性の原則' }, }; } function getAccountingStandard(category) { return ACCOUNTING_STANDARDS[category] || null; } function showAccountingStandardInfo(category) { const std = getAccountingStandard(category); if (!std) return; showToast(category + ': ' + std.standard); } // ── SHA-256ハッシュ（パスワード保護） ── async function hashPassword(pw, email) { var salt = email + 'ninja2026_v7_salt_' + email.length; var raw = pw + ':' + salt; var msgBuffer = new TextEncoder().encode(raw); var hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', msgBuffer); var hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer)); return hashArray.map(function(b){ return b.toString(16).padStart(2,'0'); }).join(''); } // 後方互換: 旧btoaハッシュの確認 function legacyHash(pw, email) { try { return btoa(pw + email + 'ninja2026salt'); } catch(e) { return ''; } } // パスワードの検証（SHA-256 + 後方互換） async function verifyPassword(pw, email, storedHash) { // 新形式（SHA-256） var newHash = await hashPassword(pw, email); if (newHash === storedHash) return true; // 旧形式（btoa）後方互換 if (legacyHash(pw, email) === storedHash) return true; return false; } // ── トークン保護（難読化） ── function protectToken(token) { if (!token) return ''; try { return btoa(encodeURIComponent(token).split('').reverse().join('')); } catch(e) { return token; } } function restoreToken(protected_token) { if (!protected_token) return ''; try { return decodeURIComponent(atob(protected_token).split('').reverse().join('')); } catch(e) { return protected_token; } } // ── ログアウト ── function signOut() { try { var key = typeof PW_KEY !== 'undefined' ? PW_KEY : 'ninja_choba_auth'; sessionStorage.removeItem(key); sessionStorage.removeItem('login_email'); sessionStorage.removeItem('login_name'); if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB.client) SB.client.auth.signOut().catch(function(){}); accounts = {}; currentAcct = null; } catch(e) {} var ap = document.getElementById('app'); var ps = document.getElementById('pw-screen'); var bn = document.getElementById('mobile-nav'); if (ap) ap.style.display = 'none'; if (bn) bn.style.display = 'none'; if (ps) { ps.style.display = 'flex'; var e1 = document.getElementById('login-email-input'); var e2 = document.getElementById('login-pw-input'); var e3 = document.getElementById('pw-error'); if (e1) e1.value = ''; if (e2) e2.value = ''; if (e3) e3.style.display = 'none'; if (typeof switchAuthTab === 'function') switchAuthTab('login'); } } // ── ログインボタン用ラッパー（async対応） ── function doCheckPassword() { if (typeof checkPassword === 'function') { Promise.resolve(checkPassword()).catch(function() { var e = document.getElementById('pw-error'); if (e) { e.style.display = 'block'; e.textContent = 'ログインエラーが発生しました'; } }); } } function doDemoLogin() { if (typeof quickDemoLogin === 'function') Promise.resolve(quickDemoLogin()).catch(function(){}); } function doHandleSignup() { if (typeof handleSignup === 'function') { Promise.resolve(handleSignup()).catch(function() { var e = document.getElementById('signup-error'); if (e) { e.style.display = 'block'; e.textContent = '登録エラーが発生しました'; } }); } } // ── 初期化 ── loadAccounts(); checkTaxSchedule(); // ── ログインフォームのイベント設定 ── (function setupLoginEvents() { function trySetup() { var loginBtn = document.getElementById('login-submit-btn'); var demoBtn = document.getElementById('demo-submit-btn'); var signupBtn = document.getElementById('signup-submit-btn'); var emailInput = document.getElementById('login-email-input'); var pwInput = document.getElementById('login-pw-input'); if (loginBtn) loginBtn.onclick = function() { doCheckPassword(); }; if (demoBtn) demoBtn.onclick = function() { doDemoLogin(); }; if (signupBtn) signupBtn.onclick = function() { doHandleSignup(); }; if (emailInput) emailInput.onkeydown = function(e) { if(e.key==='Enter') doCheckPassword(); }; if (pwInput) pwInput.onkeydown = function(e) { if(e.key==='Enter') doCheckPassword(); }; } if (document.readyState === 'loading') { document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', trySetup); } else { trySetup(); } })(); window.addEventListener('orientationchange', function() { var ps = document.getElementById('pw-screen'); if (ps && ps.style.display !== 'none') { setTimeout(function() { ps.style.alignItems = 'center'; ps.scrollTop = 0; }, 100); } }); window.addEventListener('load', function() { if (typeof checkPWAShortcut === 'function' && currentAcct) checkPWAShortcut(); if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) { navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js').then(function(reg) { console.log('[PWA] SW登録完了:', reg.scope); }).catch(function(err) { console.log('[PWA] SW登録失敗:', err); }); } }); // ── パスワード認証 ── var APP_PASSWORD = 'ninja2026'; var PW_KEY = 'ninja_choba_auth'; function quickDemoLogin() { var e = document.getElementById('login-email-input'); var p = document.getElementById('login-pw-input'); if (e) e.value = 'demo@ninja-choba.jp'; if (p) p.value = 'demo2025'; checkPassword(); } async function checkPassword() { var emailEl = document.getElementById('login-email-input'); var pwEl = document.getElementById('login-pw-input'); var errorEl = document.getElementById('pw-error'); if (!emailEl || !pwEl) return; var email = emailEl.value.trim().toLowerCase(); var pw = pwEl.value; function doLogin() { try { sessionStorage.setItem(PW_KEY,'1'); sessionStorage.setItem('login_email',email); } catch(e){} var ps = document.getElementById('pw-screen'); var ap = document.getElementById('app'); var bn = document.getElementById('mobile-nav'); if (ps) ps.style.display = 'none'; if (ap) ap.style.display = 'flex'; if (bn) bn.style.display = 'flex'; if (errorEl) errorEl.style.display = 'none'; if (typeof renderModeToggle==='function') renderModeToggle(); if (typeof renderTrialBanner==='function') renderTrialBanner(); Promise.resolve(typeof loadAccounts==='function' ? loadAccounts() : null).then(function() { if (!currentAcct && typeof accounts !== 'undefined') { var keys = Object.keys(accounts); if (keys.length > 0 && typeof selectAccount === 'function') { selectAccount(keys[0]); return; } } var mode = typeof getViewMode==='function' ? getViewMode() : 'monzen'; if (typeof switchTab==='function') switchTab(mode==='shinobi'?'dashboard':'monzen'); if (email==='demo@ninja-choba.jp' && typeof loadSuzukiDummyData==='function') { setTimeout(loadSuzukiDummyData, 500); } }).catch(function() { if (typeof switchTab==='function') switchTab('monzen'); }); } function showError(msg) { if (errorEl) { errorEl.style.display='block'; errorEl.textContent=msg; } } // まずALLOWEDリスト（マスターアカウント）を優先チェック var ALLOWED = {'asianchampions@yahoo.co.jp': APP_PASSWORD, 'demo@ninja-choba.jp': 'demo2025'}; if (ALLOWED[email] && ALLOWED[email]===pw) { doLogin(); return; } try { var users = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ninja_users')||'{}'); if (users[email]) { var verified = await verifyPassword(pw, email, users[email].pw_hash); if (verified) { try { sessionStorage.setItem('login_name', users[email].name||''); } catch(e){} doLogin(); return; } else { showError('パスワードが正しくありません'); return; } } } catch(e){} showError('メールアドレスまたはパスワードが正しくありません'); } function switchAuthTab(tab) { var lf=document.getElementById('login-form'); var sf=document.getElementById('signup-form'); var tl=document.getElementById('tab-login'); var ts=document.getElementById('tab-signup'); if (!lf||!sf) return; if (tab==='login') { lf.style.display='block'; sf.style.display='none'; if(tl){tl.style.background='var(--text)';tl.style.color='#fff';} if(ts){ts.style.background='transparent';ts.style.color='var(--text3)';} } else { lf.style.display='none'; sf.style.display='block'; if(ts){ts.style.background='var(--text)';ts.style.color='#fff';} if(tl){tl.style.background='transparent';tl.style.color='var(--text3)';} } } // セッション確認 (function(){ try { if (sessionStorage.getItem('ninja_choba_auth')==='1') { var ps=document.getElementById('pw-screen'); var ap=document.getElementById('app'); var bn=document.getElementById('mobile-nav'); if(ps) ps.style.display='none'; if(ap) ap.style.display='flex'; if(bn) bn.style.display='flex'; } } catch(e){} })(); /* ════ 電帳法チェック（開発版マージ） ════ */ function runDenchohoCheck(receipts) { const total = receipts ? receipts.length : 0; const withEvi = receipts ? receipts.filter(r => r.hasEvidence || r.imgDataUrl || r.evidenceUrl).length : 0; const rate = total > 0 ? Math.round(withEvi / total * 100) : 0; const noEvi = total - withEvi; return [ { ok: noEvi === 0, label: '証憑の電子保存', desc: noEvi === 0 ? `全${total}件の証憑が保存されています` : `${noEvi}件の証憑が未保存です。電帳法では証憑保存が必要です` }, { ok: true, label: 'タイムスタンプ要件', desc: '撮影日時が記録に紐付いています。正式運用時はタイムスタンプサービスの導入を推奨します' }, { ok: rate >= 95, label: `保存率 ${rate}%`, desc: rate >= 95 ? '良好です' : '95%以上を目指してください' }, { ok: true, label: '検索要件', desc: '日付・金額・取引先で検索可能な形式で保存されています' }, { ok: true, label: 'ディスプレイ出力要件', desc: 'このアプリ上で随時確認・出力できます' }, ]; } /* ════ 税区分学習（開発版マージ） ════ */ var TaxMemory = { save: function(merchant, taxRate) { if (!merchant) return; var mem = this._load(); mem[merchant.trim()] = taxRate; localStorage.setItem('ninjaTaxMemory', JSON.stringify(mem)); }, get: function(merchant) { if (!merchant) return null; return this._load()[merchant.trim()] || null; }, _load: function() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ninjaTaxMemory') || '{}'); } catch(e) { return {}; } } }; /* ════ P2未実装分 v20260606 ════ */ /* 1. 今月安全表示 */ function renderSafetyBadge(receipts) { var dangers = receipts.filter(function(r){ return r.aiReview && r.aiReview.risk==='danger'; }).length; var noEvi = receipts.filter(function(r){ return !r.hasEvidence && !r.imgDataUrl; }).length; var warns = receipts.filter(function(r){ return r.aiReview && r.aiReview.risk==='warn'; }).length; if (dangers===0 && noEvi===0 && warns===0) return {level:'safe', label:'今月安全', color:'#1E5C3A'}; if (dangers>0) return {level:'danger', label:'要確認', color:'#8B2020'}; if (noEvi>0) return {level:'warn', label:'証憑不足', color:'#9A6B1E'}; return {level:'warn', label:'注意', color:'#9A6B1E'}; } /* 2. AI説明の人間化 */ function humanizeAIText(text) { if (!text) return text; return text.replace(/です。/g,'と思われます。').replace(/である。/g,'の可能性があります。') .replace(/ません。/g,'ない可能性があります。').replace(/違反です/g,'違反の可能性があります') .replace(/不正です/g,'要確認の項目です').replace(/必要です。/g,'必要かもしれません。') .replace(/確実に/g,'おそらく').replace(/間違いなく/g,'可能性として'); } /* 3. AIレビュー履歴 */ var AIReviewHistory = { KEY: 'ninjaAIReviewHistory', add: function(receiptId, review) { var h = this.getAll(); h.unshift({receiptId:receiptId, review:review, reviewedAt:new Date().toISOString()}); if (h.length>200) h=h.slice(0,200); localStorage.setItem(this.KEY, JSON.stringify(h)); }, getAll: function() { try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(this.KEY)||'[]'); }catch(e){return [];} }, renderWidget: function(id) { var el=document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return; var h=this.getAll().slice(0,30); if(h.length===0){ el.innerHTML='

履歴はありません

'; return; } el.innerHTML=h.map(function(item){ var c=item.review.risk==='danger'?'#8B2020':item.review.risk==='warn'?'#9A6B1E':'#1E5C3A'; var l=item.review.risk==='danger'?'要確認':item.review.risk==='warn'?'注意':'安全'; return '
'+l+''+item.reviewedAt.slice(0,10)+'
'+humanizeAIText(item.review.reason||'')+'
'; }).join(''); } }; /* 4. 前月比較 */ function calcMonthComparison() { var all=[]; try{all=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ninjaChoubaReceipts')||'[]');}catch(e){} var now=new Date(), tp=now.toISOString().slice(0,7); var pv=new Date(now.getFullYear(),now.getMonth()-1,1), pp=pv.toISOString().slice(0,7); var tm=all.filter(function(r){return r.date&&r.date.startsWith(tp);}); var pm=all.filter(function(r){return r.date&&r.date.startsWith(pp);}); var tt=tm.reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.amount||0);},0); var pt=pm.reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.amount||0);},0); var diff=tt-pt, rate=pt>0?Math.round(diff/pt*100):0; var cats={}; tm.forEach(function(r){var c=r.category||'未分類';if(!cats[c])cats[c]={t:0,p:0};cats[c].t+=r.amount||0;}); pm.forEach(function(r){var c=r.category||'未分類';if(!cats[c])cats[c]={t:0,p:0};cats[c].p+=r.amount||0;}); return {this:{total:tt,count:tm.length},prev:{total:pt,count:pm.length},diff:diff,rate:rate,cats:cats}; } function renderMonthComparison(id) { var el=document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return; var d=calcMonthComparison(); var arrow=d.diff>0?'↑':d.diff<0?'↓':'→', color=d.diff>0?'#8B2020':d.diff<0?'#1E5C3A':'#6B6459'; el.innerHTML='
' +'
先月
¥'+d.prev.total.toLocaleString()+'
'+d.prev.count+'件
' +'
'+arrow+'
' +'
今月
¥'+d.this.total.toLocaleString()+'
'+d.this.count+'件
' +'
' +'
'+(d.diff!==0?(d.diff>0?'+':'')+'¥'+d.diff.toLocaleString()+'（'+(d.rate>0?'+':'')+d.rate+'%）':'変化なし')+'
' +Object.entries(d.cats).sort(function(a,b){return (b[1].t+b[1].p)-(a[1].t+a[1].p);}).map(function(e){ var cd=e[1].t-e[1].p, cc=cd>0?'#8B2020':cd<0?'#1E5C3A':'#6B6459'; return '
'+e[0]+''+(cd>0?'+':'')+'¥'+cd.toLocaleString()+'
'; }).join(''); } /* 5. 残高整合チェック */ function checkBalanceIntegrity() { var all=[]; try{all=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ninjaChoubaReceipts')||'[]');}catch(e){} var now=new Date(), p=now.toISOString().slice(0,7); var m=all.filter(function(r){return r.date&&r.date.startsWith(p);}); var issues=[], seen={}; m.forEach(function(r){ var key=r.date+'_'+r.merchant+'_'+r.amount; if(seen[key]) issues.push({label:'重複の可能性', desc:r.date+' '+r.merchant+' ¥'+(r.amount||0).toLocaleString(), severity:'warn'}); seen[key]=true; if((r.amount||0)>1000000) issues.push({label:'高額経費', desc:r.merchant+' ¥'+(r.amount||0).toLocaleString(), severity:'warn'}); }); var noEviTotal=m.filter(function(r){return !r.hasEvidence;}).reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.amount||0);},0); if(noEviTotal>0) issues.push({label:'証憑なし経費合計', desc:'¥'+noEviTotal.toLocaleString()+' — 控除対象外の可能性', severity:'warn'}); return {issues:issues, total:m.reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.amount||0);},0), count:m.length}; } /* 6. 締め処理・締め後変更警告 */ var ClosingStore = { KEY: 'ninjaClosing', getAll: function(){ try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(this.KEY)||'{}');}catch(e){return{};} }, isClosed: function(ym){ return !!this.getAll()[ym]; }, close: function(ym){ var a=this.getAll(); a[ym]={closedAt:new Date().toISOString()}; localStorage.setItem(this.KEY,JSON.stringify(a)); }, open: function(ym){ var a=this.getAll(); delete a[ym]; localStorage.setItem(this.KEY,JSON.stringify(a)); }, warn: function(receipt){ var ym=(receipt.date||'').slice(0,7); return this.isClosed(ym)?'⚠ '+ym+' は締め済みです':null; } }; /* 7. merchant-memory */ var MerchantMemory = { KEY: 'ninjaMerchantMemory', save: function(r){ if(!r.merchant) return; var m=this._load(), k=r.merchant.trim(); m[k]={category:r.category||m[k]&&m[k].category||'', taxRate:r.taxRate||'10%', count:(m[k]&&m[k].count||0)+1, lastUsed:new Date().toISOString()}; localStorage.setItem(this.KEY,JSON.stringify(m)); }, get: function(merchant){ return merchant?this._load()[merchant.trim()]||null:null; }, suggest: function(partial){ if(!partial) return []; var m=this._load(); return Object.keys(m).filter(function(k){return k.includes(partial);}).sort(function(a,b){return (m[b].count||0)-(m[a].count||0);}).slice(0,5); }, _load: function(){ try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(this.KEY)||'{}');}catch(e){return{};} } }; /* 8. correction-learning */ var CorrectionLearning = { KEY: 'ninjaCorrectionLearning', record: function(orig, fixed){ var logs=this._load(); logs.unshift({from:orig.category, to:fixed.category, merchant:orig.merchant, at:new Date().toISOString()}); if(logs.length>100) logs=logs.slice(0,100); localStorage.setItem(this.KEY,JSON.stringify(logs)); }, stats: function(){ var l=this._load(); return {total:l.length, logs:l.slice(0,10)}; }, _load: function(){ try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(this.KEY)||'[]');}catch(e){return[];} } }; /* 9. ユーザー傾向学習 */ var UserTrend = { analyze: function(){ var all=[]; try{all=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ninjaChoubaReceipts')||'[]');}catch(e){} if(all.length===0) return null; var dow=[0,0,0,0,0,0,0]; all.forEach(function(r){ if(r.date) dow[new Date(r.date).getDay()]++; }); var cats={}; all.forEach(function(r){ var c=r.category||'未分類'; cats[c]=(cats[c]||0)+(r.amount||0); }); var months={}; all.forEach(function(r){ if(r.date){ var ym=r.date.slice(0,7); months[ym]=(months[ym]||0)+(r.amount||0); } }); var mv=Object.values(months), avg=mv.length>0?Math.round(mv.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0)/mv.length):0; return { peakDay:['日','月','火','水','木','金','土'][dow.indexOf(Math.max.apply(null,dow))], topCats:Object.entries(cats).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];}).slice(0,3), avgMonthly:avg, total:all.length }; } }; /* 10. 手裏剣システム */ var ShurikenSystem = { KEY: 'ninjaShurikens', RULES: [ {id:'first', label:'初記録', shuriken:1, check:function(a){return a.length>=1;}}, {id:'ten', label:'十枚の記録', shuriken:2, check:function(a){return a.length>=10;}}, {id:'fifty', label:'五十枚', shuriken:5, check:function(a){return a.length>=50;}}, {id:'fullevi', label:'証憑皆揃い', shuriken:3, check:function(a){ var p=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,7), m=a.filter(function(r){return r.date&&r.date.startsWith(p);}); return m.length>0&&m.every(function(r){return r.hasEvidence;}); }}, {id:'nodanger',label:'無事是名馬', shuriken:3, check:function(a){ var p=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,7), m=a.filter(function(r){return r.date&&r.date.startsWith(p);}); return m.length>0&&m.every(function(r){return !r.aiReview||r.aiReview.risk!=='danger';}); }}, {id:'variety', label:'多芸は無芸', shuriken:2, check:function(a){ return new Set(a.map(function(r){return r.category;}).filter(Boolean)).size>=5; }}, ], check: function(all){ var earned=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(this.KEY)||'[]'), newOnes=[]; var self=this; this.RULES.forEach(function(rule){ if(!earned.includes(rule.id)&&rule.check(all)){ earned.push(rule.id); newOnes.push(rule); } }); if(newOnes.length>0) localStorage.setItem(this.KEY,JSON.stringify(earned)); return newOnes; }, getEarned: function(){ var e=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(this.KEY)||'[]'); return this.RULES.filter(function(r){return e.includes(r.id);}); }, getTotal: function(){ return this.getEarned().reduce(function(s,r){return s+r.shuriken;},0); }, showAchievement: function(rule){ var t=document.createElement('div'); t.style.cssText='position:fixed;bottom:80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#1A1A1A;color:#fff;padding:12px 24px;border-radius:12px;font-size:13px;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);'; t.innerHTML='🌟 '+rule.label+'
手裏剣 ×'+rule.shuriken+' 獲得'; document.body.appendChild(t); setTimeout(function(){t.style.opacity='1';},100); setTimeout(function(){t.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){t.remove();},400);},3500); } }; function checkAndShowShurikens(){ var all=[]; try{all=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ninjaChoubaReceipts')||'[]');}catch(e){} ShurikenSystem.check(all).forEach(function(rule){ setTimeout(function(){ShurikenSystem.showAchievement(rule);},800); }); } /* ════ 資金繰り追加機能 v20260606 ════ */ /* ── 変動費分析 ── */ function analyzeVariableCosts(a) { var journals = (a && a.journals) || []; var receipts = []; try { receipts = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ninjaChoubaReceipts') || '[]'); } catch(e) {} var now = new Date(); var months = {}; for (var i = 5; i >= 0; i--) { var d = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i, 1); var ym = d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'); months[ym] = { fixed: 0, variable: 0, label: (d.getMonth()+1) + '月' }; } // 固定費：毎月同額・同科目のもの var FIXED_CATS = ['地代家賃','水道光熱費','通信費','保険料','リース料','減価償却費']; var VAR_CATS = ['交際費','会議費','旅費交通費','広告宣伝費','消耗品費','雑費','外注費']; journals.forEach(function(j) { if (j.type !== 'expense' || !j.date) return; var ym = j.date.slice(0,7); if (!months[ym]) return; var cat = j.category || ''; if (FIXED_CATS.some(function(c){return cat.includes(c);})) { months[ym].fixed += j.amount || 0; } else { months[ym].variable += j.amount || 0; } }); receipts.forEach(function(r) { if (!r.date) return; var ym = r.date.slice(0,7); if (!months[ym]) return; var cat = r.category || ''; if (FIXED_CATS.some(function(c){return cat.includes(c);})) { months[ym].fixed += r.amount || 0; } else { months[ym].variable += r.amount || 0; } }); return Object.entries(months).map(function(e) { return Object.assign({ym: e[0]}, e[1]); }); } function renderVariableCostsWidget(containerId, a) { var el = document.getElementById(containerId); if (!el) return; var data = analyzeVariableCosts(a); var maxVal = Math.max.apply(null, data.map(function(d){ return d.fixed + d.variable; })) || 1; el.innerHTML = '
固定費 vs 変動費（直近6ヶ月）
' + '
' + data.map(function(d) { var total = d.fixed + d.variable; var fh = Math.round(d.fixed / maxVal * 72); var vh = Math.round(d.variable / maxVal * 72); return '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + d.label + '
' + '
'; }).join('') + '
' + '
' + '固定費' + '変動費' + '
'; } /* ── 大口支払い通知 ── */ function checkLargePayments(a) { var plan = getCashflowPlan(a); var now = new Date(); var alerts = []; for (var i = 0; i <= 2; i++) { var d = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() + i, 1); var ym = d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'); var label = i === 0 ? '今月' : i === 1 ? '来月' : '再来月'; plan.filter(function(p) { return p.ym === ym && p.type === 'expense' && (p.amount || 0) >= 100000; }).forEach(function(p) { alerts.push({ label: label, name: p.name || '支払予定', amount: p.amount, ym: ym, severity: p.amount >= 500000 ? 'danger' : 'warn' }); }); } return alerts; } function renderLargePaymentAlerts(containerId, a) { var el = document.getElementById(containerId); if (!el) return; var alerts = checkLargePayments(a); if (alerts.length === 0) { el.innerHTML = '

大口支払い予定はありません

'; return; } el.innerHTML = alerts.map(function(alert) { var color = alert.severity === 'danger' ? '#8B2020' : '#9A6B1E'; var bg = alert.severity === 'danger' ? '#FFF0F0' : '#FFF8EC'; return '
' + '
' + alert.label + '
' + '
' + alert.name + '
' + '
¥' + (alert.amount||0).toLocaleString() + '
' + '
'; }).join(''); } /* ── 固定費登録UI ── */ function showAddFixedCostDialog(a) { var existingEl = document.getElementById('fixed-cost-dialog'); if (existingEl) existingEl.remove(); var dialog = document.createElement('div'); dialog.id = 'fixed-cost-dialog'; dialog.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:9000;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;'; dialog.innerHTML = '

'; dialog.addEventListener('click', function() { dialog.remove(); }); document.body.appendChild(dialog); document.getElementById('fc-name').focus(); } function saveFixedCost() { var a = accounts[currentAcct]; if (!a) return; var type = document.getElementById('fc-type').value; var name = document.getElementById('fc-name').value.trim(); var amount = Number(document.getElementById('fc-amount').value) || 0; var ym = document.getElementById('fc-ym').value; var repeat = document.getElementById('fc-repeat').value; if (!name || !amount || !ym) { alert('名称・金額・対象月を入力してください'); return; } var plan = getCashflowPlan(a); var months = repeat === 'once' ? 1 : Number(repeat); for (var i = 0; i < months; i++) { var d = new Date(ym + '-01'); d.setMonth(d.getMonth() + i); var targetYm = d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'); plan.push({ id: crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID() : Date.now() + '_' + i, type: type, name: name, amount: amount, ym: targetYm, repeat: repeat, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }); } saveCashflowPlan(plan); document.getElementById('fixed-cost-dialog').remove(); // 資金繰り画面を再描画 if (typeof renderCashflow === 'function') renderCashflow(); // トースト通知 var t = document.createElement('div'); t.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#1A1A1A;color:#fff;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:999px;font-size:13px;z-index:9999;white-space:nowrap;'; t.textContent = name + ' を追加しました'; document.body.appendChild(t); setTimeout(function(){t.remove();}, 2500); } /* ── 資金不足予測（〇ヶ月後に赤字になる可能性） ── */ function forecastCashShortage(a) { var startBalance = typeof getTotalBankBalance === 'function' ? getTotalBankBalance() : (a && a.bank_balance || 0); var months = calcCashflow(a, startBalance); var shortages = months.filter(function(m) { return m.closeBalance < 0 || m.net < 0; }); return { months: months, shortages: shortages, firstShortage: shortages.length > 0 ? shortages[0] : null, safeMonths: months.filter(function(m) { return m.closeBalance >= 0; }).length }; } function renderShortageAlert(containerId, a) { var el = document.getElementById(containerId); if (!el) return; var result = forecastCashShortage(a); if (!result.firstShortage) { el.innerHTML = '
' + '✓ 6ヶ月以内に資金不足の見込みはありません
'; } else { el.innerHTML = '
' + '
⚠ ' + result.firstShortage.label + 'に資金不足の可能性があります
' + '
残高予測: ¥' + result.firstShortage.closeBalance.toLocaleString() + '（参考値）
' + '
'; } } /* ── 融資相談用サマリーPDF出力 ── */ function printFundingReport(a) { if (!a) return; var startBalance = typeof getTotalBankBalance === 'function' ? getTotalBankBalance() : (a.bank_balance || 0); var months = calcCashflow(a, startBalance); var avgIncome = months.slice(0,3).reduce(function(s,m){return s+m.income;},0)/3; var avgExpense = months.slice(0,3).reduce(function(s,m){return s+m.expense;},0)/3; var avgNet = avgIncome - avgExpense; var win = window.open('', '_blank'); win.document.write('' + '資金繰り表 — 忍者帳場' + '' + '

資金繰り表

' + '

作成日：' + new Date().toLocaleDateString('ja-JP') + '　/ 忍者帳場 v' + ver + '

' + '

6ヶ月予測

' + '' + months.map(function(m) { var netClass = m.net >= 0 ? 'pos' : 'neg'; var balClass = m.closeBalance >= 0 ? 'pos' : 'neg'; return '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + ''; }).join('') + '
月収入支出収支期末残高
' + m.label + (m.isForecast ? '（予）' : '') + '¥' + m.income.toLocaleString() + '¥' + m.expense.toLocaleString() + '' + (m.net >= 0 ? '+' : '') + '¥' + m.net.toLocaleString() + '¥' + m.closeBalance.toLocaleString() + '
' + '

月次平均（直近3ヶ月実績ベース）

' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '
項目金額
平均月間収入¥' + Math.round(avgIncome).toLocaleString() + '
平均月間支出¥' + Math.round(avgExpense).toLocaleString() + '
平均月間収支' + (avgNet>=0?'+':'') + '¥' + Math.round(avgNet).toLocaleString() + '
現在残高¥' + startBalance.toLocaleString() + '
' + '

※ 本資料はAIによる予測を含む参考情報です。実際の数値と異なる場合があります。
' + '融資判断・申告等には必ず税理士・金融機関にご相談ください。

' + ''); win.document.close(); win.print(); } var CASHFLOW_VER = 'v20260606'; /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════ 新物件収支シミュレーション 借入・利息・損益・税金・メンテナンス費用を考慮 ════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ /* ── シミュレーション計算エンジン ── */ function calcPropertySimulation(params) { var p = params; var years = p.years || 30; var rows = []; // ── 減価償却 ── // 建物比率（土地は償却不可） var buildingValue = p.price * (p.buildingRatio / 100); var landValue = p.price - buildingValue; // 法定耐用年数（簡便法：中古は残存年数 = 法定耐用年数 - 築年数 + 築年数×0.2） var legalLife = p.structure === 'rc' ? 47 : p.structure === 'steel' ? 34 : 22; var remainLife = p.age > 0 ? Math.max(2, Math.floor((legalLife - p.age) + p.age * 0.2)) : legalLife; var annualDepreciation = Math.round(buildingValue / remainLife); // ── 借入返済（元利均等） ── var loan = p.loanAmount || 0; var rate = (p.interestRate || 0) / 100 / 12; // 月利 var termMonths = (p.loanYears || 35) * 12; var monthlyPayment = loan > 0 && rate > 0 ? Math.round(loan * rate * Math.pow(1 + rate, termMonths) / (Math.pow(1 + rate, termMonths) - 1)) : loan > 0 ? Math.round(loan / termMonths) : 0; var annualPayment = monthlyPayment * 12; var remainingLoan = loan; // ── 年次シミュレーション ── for (var yr = 1; yr <= years; yr++) { // 収入：家賃（空室率・家賃下落率を考慮） var vacancyRate = (p.vacancyRate || 5) / 100; var rentDecline = Math.pow(1 - (p.rentDeclineRate || 0.5) / 100, yr - 1); var annualRent = Math.round(p.monthlyRent * 12 * (1 - vacancyRate) * rentDecline); // その他収入（駐車場・看板等） var otherIncome = (p.otherMonthlyIncome || 0) * 12; // 支出：ローン利息分 var annualInterest = 0; var annualPrincipal = 0; if (yr <= (p.loanYears || 35) && loan > 0) { var tmpLoan = remainingLoan; for (var m = 0; m < 12; m++) { var interest = Math.round(tmpLoan * rate); var principal = monthlyPayment - interest; annualInterest += interest; annualPrincipal += principal; tmpLoan = Math.max(0, tmpLoan - principal); } remainingLoan = tmpLoan; } // 支出：固定費 var propertyTax = p.propertyTax || 0; // 固定資産税 var managementFee = (p.managementRate || 5) / 100 * annualRent; // 管理委託料 var insurance = p.insurance || 0; // 火災保険等 var repairReserve = p.repairReserve || 0; // 修繕積立 // 支出：メンテナンス（築年数に応じて増加） var baseRepair = p.annualRepair || 0; var repairMulti = 1 + Math.floor((p.age + yr - 1) / 10) * 0.3; var annualRepair = Math.round(baseRepair * repairMulti); // 大規模修繕（10年ごと） var majorRepair = (yr % 10 === 0) ? (p.majorRepair || 0) : 0; // 総支出（キャッシュアウト） var totalExpenseCash = annualInterest + propertyTax + managementFee + insurance + repairReserve + annualRepair + majorRepair; // 税務上の損益（利息・減価償却・諸経費は損金算入可） var taxableIncome = annualRent + otherIncome - annualInterest // 利息（損金） - annualDepreciation // 減価償却（損金） - propertyTax // 固定資産税（損金） - managementFee // 管理料（損金） - insurance // 保険料（損金） - annualRepair // 修繕費（損金） - majorRepair; // 大規模修繕（損金） // 所得税・住民税（不動産所得に対する概算税率） var taxRate = p.taxRate || 30; // 実効税率（%） var incomeTax = taxableIncome > 0 ? Math.round(taxableIncome * (taxRate / 100)) : 0; // キャッシュフロー（手取り） var cashInflow = annualRent + otherIncome; var cashOutflow = annualPayment + propertyTax + managementFee + insurance + repairReserve + annualRepair + majorRepair; var netCashflow = cashInflow - cashOutflow - incomeTax; // 実質利回り var grossYield = annualRent / p.price * 100; var netYield = netCashflow / (p.price - loan) * 100; // 自己資金に対する利回り rows.push({ year: yr, annualRent: annualRent, otherIncome: otherIncome, cashInflow: cashInflow, annualInterest: annualInterest, annualPrincipal: annualPrincipal, annualPayment: yr <= (p.loanYears||35) ? annualPayment : 0, remainingLoan: remainingLoan, propertyTax: propertyTax, managementFee: Math.round(managementFee), insurance: insurance, repairReserve: repairReserve, annualRepair: annualRepair, majorRepair: majorRepair, cashOutflow: Math.round(cashOutflow), annualDepreciation: annualDepreciation, taxableIncome: Math.round(taxableIncome), incomeTax: incomeTax, netCashflow: Math.round(netCashflow), grossYield: grossYield.toFixed(2), netYield: netYield.toFixed(2), cumulativeCashflow: 0, // 後で累積計算 }); } // 累積キャッシュフロー var cumulative = -(p.price - loan) - (p.initialCost || 0); // 自己資金＋初期費用 rows.forEach(function(r) { cumulative += r.netCashflow; r.cumulativeCashflow = cumulative; }); // 損益分岐点（累積がプラスになる年） var breakEvenYear = null; rows.forEach(function(r) { if (r.cumulativeCashflow >= 0 && breakEvenYear === null) { breakEvenYear = r.year; } }); // 30年後の資産価値（簡易：建物は残存価値なし、土地は維持） var assetValue30 = landValue; var equity30 = assetValue30 - (remainingLoan > 0 ? remainingLoan : 0); return { rows: rows, breakEvenYear: breakEvenYear, legalLife: legalLife, remainLife: remainLife, annualDepreciation: annualDepreciation, monthlyPayment: monthlyPayment, landValue: Math.round(landValue), buildingValue: Math.round(buildingValue), assetValue30: Math.round(assetValue30), equity30: Math.round(equity30), selfFund: p.price - loan + (p.initialCost || 0), }; } /* ── シミュレーション画面を開く ── */ function showPropertySimulation() { var existing = document.getElementById('prop-sim-modal'); if (existing) existing.remove(); var modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'prop-sim-modal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);z-index:8000;overflow-y:auto;'; modal.innerHTML = `
新物件収支シミュレーション
📋 物件情報
${simInput('ps-price', '物件価格（万円）', '3000', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-building-ratio', '建物比率（%）', '70', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-age', '築年数', '10', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-structure', '構造', '', 'select', [{v:'wood',l:'木造（22年）'},{v:'steel',l:'軽鉄（27年）'},{v:'rc',l:'RC・鉄骨（47年）'}])} ${simInput('ps-rent', '月額家賃収入（万円）', '15', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-other-income','その他月収入（万円）', '0', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-vacancy', '空室率（%）', '5', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-rent-decline','家賃下落率（%/年）', '0.5', 'number')}
🏦 借入条件
${simInput('ps-loan', '借入金額（万円）', '2400', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-rate', '金利（%/年）', '1.5', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-loan-years', '返済期間（年）', '35', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-initial', '初期費用（万円）', '100', 'number')}
💰 費用・税金
${simInput('ps-prop-tax', '固定資産税（万円/年）', '15', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-mgmt-rate', '管理委託料率（%）', '5', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-insurance', '保険料（万円/年）', '5', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-repair-rsv', '修繕積立（万円/月）', '2', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-repair', '年間修繕費（万円）', '5', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-major-repair','大規模修繕（万円/10年）', '100', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-tax-rate', '実効税率（%）', '30', 'number')} ${simInput('ps-years', 'シミュレーション期間（年）','30', 'number')}
`; document.body.appendChild(modal); } function simInput(id, label, defaultVal, type, options) { if (type === 'select') { return '
' + '
'; } return '
' + '
'; } function getSimVal(id, multiplier) { var v = parseFloat(document.getElementById(id).value) || 0; return multiplier ? v * multiplier : v; } function runPropertySimulation() { var params = { price: getSimVal('ps-price', 10000), buildingRatio: getSimVal('ps-building-ratio'), age: getSimVal('ps-age'), structure: document.getElementById('ps-structure').value, monthlyRent: getSimVal('ps-rent', 10000), otherMonthlyIncome: getSimVal('ps-other-income', 10000), vacancyRate: getSimVal('ps-vacancy'), rentDeclineRate: getSimVal('ps-rent-decline'), loanAmount: getSimVal('ps-loan', 10000), interestRate: getSimVal('ps-rate'), loanYears: getSimVal('ps-loan-years'), initialCost: getSimVal('ps-initial', 10000), propertyTax: getSimVal('ps-prop-tax', 10000), managementRate: getSimVal('ps-mgmt-rate'), insurance: getSimVal('ps-insurance', 10000), repairReserve: getSimVal('ps-repair-rsv', 10000), annualRepair: getSimVal('ps-repair', 10000), majorRepair: getSimVal('ps-major-repair', 10000), taxRate: getSimVal('ps-tax-rate'), years: getSimVal('ps-years'), }; var result = calcPropertySimulation(params); renderSimulationResult(params, result); } function renderSimulationResult(p, r) { var el = document.getElementById('sim-result'); if (!el) return; var selfFund = p.price - p.loanAmount + p.initialCost; var yr1 = r.rows[0]; var yr5 = r.rows[Math.min(4, r.rows.length-1)]; var yr10 = r.rows[Math.min(9, r.rows.length-1)]; var yr30 = r.rows[r.rows.length-1]; // KPIカラー判定 function color(v) { return v >= 0 ? '#1E5C3A' : '#8B2020'; } function fmt(v) { return (v >= 0 ? '+' : '') + Math.round(v/10000).toLocaleString() + '万円'; } function fmtM(v) { return (v >= 0 ? '+' : '') + Math.round(v/10000).toLocaleString() + '万'; } el.innerHTML = `
シミュレーション結果サマリー
${simKPI('自己資金', Math.round(selfFund/10000).toLocaleString()+'万円', '#fff')} ${simKPI('月次ローン返済', Math.round(r.monthlyPayment/10000*10)/10+'万円', '#fff')} ${simKPI('1年目CF', fmtM(yr1.netCashflow), color(yr1.netCashflow))} ${simKPI('表面利回り', yr1.grossYield+'%', '#F0D080')} ${simKPI('実質利回り', yr1.netYield+'%', color(parseFloat(yr1.netYield)))} ${simKPI('損益分岐', r.breakEvenYear ? r.breakEvenYear+'年目' : '30年超', color(r.breakEvenYear?1:-1))} ${simKPI('30年累積CF', fmt(yr30.cumulativeCashflow), color(yr30.cumulativeCashflow))} ${simKPI('土地残存価値', Math.round(r.landValue/10000)+'万円', '#9ADDC8')}
📋 税務情報
法定耐用年数：${r.legalLife}年
残存耐用年数：${r.remainLife}年
年間減価償却：${Math.round(r.annualDepreciation/10000)}万円
建物評価額：${Math.round(r.buildingValue/10000)}万円
年次キャッシュフロー
${r.rows.slice(0, 30).map(function(row) { var maxCF = Math.max.apply(null, r.rows.slice(0,30).map(function(x){return Math.abs(x.netCashflow);})) || 1; var h = Math.max(2, Math.round(Math.abs(row.netCashflow) / maxCF * 80)); var isPos = row.netCashflow >= 0; return '
' + '
' + '
' + (row.year%5===0?row.year+'年':'') + '
' + '
'; }).join('')}
黒字 赤字
年次詳細（万円）
${[1,3,5,7,10,15,20,25,30].filter(function(y){return y<=p.years;}).map(function(y) { var row = r.rows[y-1]; if (!row) return ''; var isPos = row.netCashflow >= 0; var cumPos = row.cumulativeCashflow >= 0; var bg = y%2===0?'#F8F8F8':'#fff'; function w(v){ return Math.round(v/10000); } return '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + ''; }).join('')}
年 家賃収入 支出合計 利息 修繕費 税金 当年CF 累積CF
'+y+'年目'+w(row.annualRent)+''+w(row.cashOutflow)+''+w(row.annualInterest)+''+w(row.annualRepair+(y%10===0?row.majorRepair:0))+''+w(row.incomeTax)+''+(isPos?'+':'')+w(row.netCashflow)+''+(cumPos?'+':'')+w(row.cumulativeCashflow)+'
⚖ 税務インパクト（1年目）
不動産収入+${Math.round(yr1.annualRent/10000)}万円
損金算入（利息）▲${Math.round(yr1.annualInterest/10000)}万円
損金算入（減価償却）▲${Math.round(r.annualDepreciation/10000)}万円
損金算入（諸経費）▲${Math.round((yr1.propertyTax+yr1.managementFee+yr1.insurance+yr1.annualRepair)/10000)}万円
不動産所得（税務） ${(yr1.taxableIncome>=0?'+':'')+Math.round(yr1.taxableIncome/10000)}万円
概算税額（${p.taxRate}%） ▲${Math.round(yr1.incomeTax/10000)}万円
※ 概算です。実際の税額は税理士にご確認ください。
※ 本シミュレーションは参考値です。投資判断・税務申告は必ず専門家にご相談ください。
`; // PDF出力用にデータを保存 window._lastSimParams = p; window._lastSimResult = r; } function simKPI(label, value, color) { return '
' + '
' + label + '
' + '
' + value + '
' + '
'; } function printPropertySimReport() { var p = window._lastSimParams; var r = window._lastSimResult; if (!p || !r) return; function w(v){ return Math.round(v/10000); } var win = window.open('', '_blank'); win.document.write('' + '物件収支シミュレーション — 忍者帳場' + '' + '

' + '' + [1,3,5,7,10,15,20,25,30].filter(function(y){return y<=p.years;}).map(function(y) { var row = r.rows[y-1]; if(!row) return ''; var nc = row.netCashflow>=0?'pos':'neg', cc = row.cumulativeCashflow>=0?'pos':'neg'; return '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + ''; }).join('') + '
年家賃収入支出合計利息減価償却税務所得税額当年CF累積CF
'+y+'年目'+w(row.annualRent)+''+w(row.cashOutflow)+''+w(row.annualInterest)+''+w(r.annualDepreciation)+''+(row.taxableIncome>=0?'+':'')+w(row.taxableIncome)+''+w(row.incomeTax)+''+(row.netCashflow>=0?'+':'')+w(row.netCashflow)+''+(row.cumulativeCashflow>=0?'+':'')+w(row.cumulativeCashflow)+'
